postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y openssh-server && sudo ssh-keygen -A && echo 'root:codespace' | sudo chpasswd && sudo sed -i 's/^#PermitRootLogin.*/PermitRootLogin yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sudo sed -i 's/^PasswordAuthentication.*/PasswordAuthentication yes/' /etc/ssh/sshd_config && sudo service ssh start && sudo service ssh restart
postStartCommand: sudo service ssh start; nohup ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o UserKnownHostsFile=/dev/null -N -D 0.0.0.0:1080 root@localhost >/dev/null 2>&1 &
